creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
I've attached an initial patch to make the symlink rc.d script work for
DHCPv6. It still probably needs documentation and it also looks like it
might be a good idea to make parallel changes to isc-dhcp41-relay.
-- 
Douglas William Thrift
<douglas@douglasthrift.net>
<http://douglasthrift.net/>
